title: Spawner Breaker
description: Full control over who can break, drop, and collect spawners - with mob-type preservation, permission
body:
Spawner Breaker is a powerful and fully customizable Minecraft plugin designed for server owners who want complete control over how mob spawners are handled.
With permission-based drops, mob-type preservation, Silk Touch toggle, customizable messages, and admin commands, this plugin gives your server maximum flexibility while staying lightweight and efficient.

Whether you run a survival server, an economy-based world, or a custom factions setup, this plugin ensures spawner-breaking behavior is exactly what you want it to be.

For setup instructions, configuration details, and developer documentation, visit the GitHub project page:
https://github.com/Usama-Balhasal/Spawner-Breaker
